task.en:
Open Notes and create a new note titled exactly `Project Atlas Kickoff`. The body must contain the following four lines (one per line, in this order) after the title:
```
Owner: Priya Raman
Start date: 2026-07-06
Budget: $48,000
Goal: ship the v1 dashboard by Q3
```
Do not add any other notes. The note can live in the default folder.

pre_command: UDB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$UDB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access (service,client,client_type,auth_value,auth_reason,auth_version,csreq,indirect_object_identifier_type,indirect_object_identifier,flags) VALUES ('kTCCServiceAppleEvents','/usr/libexec/sshd-keygen-wrapper',1,2,3,1,NULL,0,'com.apple.Notes',0);" 2>/dev/null; (sudo killall tccd 2>/dev/null; killall tccd 2>/dev/null); sleep 1; for A in "/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app" "/Applications/iTerm.app" "/Applications/iTerm2.app" "/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" "/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app"; do [ -d "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || sudo chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note' -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note in folder "Recently Deleted"' -e 'tell application "Notes" to quit' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
grading_command: osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get name of every note' 2>/dev/null | grep -qF 'Project Atlas Kickoff' && echo True || echo False
B=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Project Atlas Kickoff"' 2>/dev/null); echo "$B" | grep -qF 'Owner: Priya Raman' && echo True || echo False
B=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Project Atlas Kickoff"' 2>/dev/null); echo "$B" | grep -qF 'Start date: 2026-07-06' && echo True || echo False
B=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Project Atlas Kickoff"' 2>/dev/null); echo "$B" | grep -qF 'Budget: $48,000' && echo True || echo False
B=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Project Atlas Kickoff"' 2>/dev/null); echo "$B" | grep -qF 'ship the v1 dashboard by Q3' && echo True || echo False
